name: Rendon Ceratops
flavor_text: Denethix's outer walls were built tall enough to discourage most predators. Most.
art_prompt: A stocky ceratopsian dinosaur with a broad bony frill and thick horns charges forward, muscles tensed for impact. Dusty brown and slate-grey scales cover its powerful frame. Behind it, the towering stone walls of a medieval city recede, dwarfed by the creature's sheer mass and presence.. Stylized digital illustration, wide naturalist composition, rich earth tones with dappled light, layered depth, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
design_notes: Green common french vanilla at CMC 3. A 3/3 trample for {2}{G} is a solid but fair limited creature -- P+T = 6 = CMC+3 exactly. Trample is the most iconic green evergreen keyword and plays perfectly on a dinosaur. The Dinosaur type ties into the set's wilderness teeming with dinosaurs. Clean, simple, does one thing well.
